rationale: Ground truth has no substantive concerns, so recall is vacuously satisfied by both. Both candidates correctly validate the core gate-logic fix and identify the same latent sm_110 ambiguity, with no fabricated claims apparent in either. X is more actionable: it surfaces a concrete, verifiable test-coverage gap (missing (10,1)/sm_101 parametrization), proposes exact inline-comment text, and includes a doc-heading nit with a specific fix, whereas Y raises essentially the same sm_110 point but then argues for omitting it and recommends a clean approve with no concrete deltas.
